The team will commence the week with a strategic planning phase to align on objectives. A collaborative brainstorming session is scheduled for Monday morning to refine the feature scope. This initial update ensures all stakeholders understand the project's direction and key milestones.

Monday through Friday will be dedicated to intensive development and rigorous quality assurance. The daily agenda includes a morning stand-up, focused coding blocks, and an afternoon review. Developers must submit a code update by 4 PM each day for immediate peer review. Testing protocols will be executed in parallel to identify and resolve bugs efficiently. For further guidance on agile methodologies, please refer to [Agile Best Practices](https://www.agilemanifesto.org). The final Friday will conclude with a comprehensive demo and retrospective analysis.
